2002.issue: [W2002] Version of [package.json](https://github.com/bloop16/ioBroker.steam/blob/master/package.json) (0.5.11) doesn't match latest version on [NPM](https://www.npmjs.com/package/iobroker.steam) (0.5.10)

2004.issue: [E2004] Version "0.5.11" listed at common.news at [io-package.json](https://github.com/bloop16/ioBroker.steam/blob/master/io-package.json) does not exist at [NPM](https://www.npmjs.com/package/iobroker.steam). Please remove from news section.

3032.issue: [W3032] Release 0.5.11 from [io-package.json](https://github.com/bloop16/ioBroker.steam/blob/master/io-package.json)/package.json has not yet been tagged. Tagging releases is required.

5004.issue: [S5004] Plain setInterval() found in source files (main.js). Please use this.setInterval() or adapter.setInterval() instead.

5005.issue: [S5005] Plain setTimeout() found in source files (main.js). Please use this.setTimeout() or adapter.setTimeout() instead.

5600.issue: [E5600] i18n directory "admin/i18n" contains both long format ({lang}/translations.json) and short format ({lang}.json) for language(s): es, fr, it, nl, pl, pt, ru, uk, zh-cn. Please use only one format.

5601.issue: [S5601] i18n directory "admin/i18n" uses long format ({lang}/translations.json). Consider migrating to short format ({lang}.json) using "npm run translate convert".

5606.issue: [W5606] i18n "admin/i18n" seems to contain untranslated entries identical to English (>5 words). Affected languages: fr (22 keys, examples: Added owned game '%s' (AppID: %s) to config list., Attempting to fetch recently played games...); it (2 keys, examples: Steam API Setup Info, Steam Name Help); nl (7 keys, examples: Could not find game name for AppID %s in the fetched list., Disabled "Enable owned games" option to prevent refetching.).

5612.issue: [W5612] "admin/jsonConfig.json/items/games/items/getOwnedGames" attribute "tooltip" uses key "Load games owned by this Steam account" which is not found in the English translation file at "admin/i18n/en".

6030.issue: [W6030] Changelog section in [README.md](https://github.com/bloop16/ioBroker.steam/blob/master/README.md) should contain an entry for [io-package.json](https://github.com/bloop16/ioBroker.steam/blob/master/io-package.json) version 0.5.11.

0034.issue: [W0034] @iobroker/adapter-core 3.3.2 specified. 3.4.1 (or newer) is current. Please update dependencies at [package.json](https://github.com/bloop16/ioBroker.steam/blob/master/package.json)

0078.issue: [W0078] Remove obsolete devDependencies typescript-eslint when using "@iobroker/eslint-config".
